channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Just in: Spain's run to the title was a defensive mastercla…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
Just in:

Spain's run to the title was a defensive masterclass, with wins over four of the world's top ten teams. They are the first World Cup champion to win the title while only conceding a single goal.
item.content:encoded:
Just in:

Spain's run to the title was a defensive masterclass, with wins over four of the world's top ten teams. They are the first World Cup champion to win the title while only conceding a single goal.

item.title: With President Trump in attendance, an all-superstar lineup …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: With President Trump in attendance, an all-superstar lineup that included Madonna, BTS, Justin Bieber and Burna Boy felt a little more political than it might have otherwise. n.pr/4vzeCrT
item.content:encoded: With President Trump in attendance, an all-superstar lineup that included Madonna, BTS, Justin Bieber and Burna Boy felt a little more political than it might have otherwise. n.pr/4vzeCrT

item.title: Morton Feldman brought the syntax of the future to the vocab…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Morton Feldman brought the syntax of the future to the vocabulary of the past, creating music that feels both radically experimental and deeply classical.
item.content:encoded: Morton Feldman brought the syntax of the future to the vocabulary of the past, creating music that feels both radically experimental and deeply classical.

item.title: Update: Two U.S. service members were killed in action whil…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
Update:

Two U.S. service members were killed in action while "partner forces defended against Iranian ballistic missile and drone attacks," U.S. Central Command said Saturday.
item.content:encoded:
Update:

Two U.S. service members were killed in action while "partner forces defended against Iranian ballistic missile and drone attacks," U.S. Central Command said Saturday.

item.title: Worry no more about wildfire smoke and $10,000 ticket prices…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Worry no more about wildfire smoke and $10,000 ticket prices. Sunday's final between Argentina and Spain — the first meeting of their transcendent stars — is here and seems destined to be a classic.
item.content:encoded: Worry no more about wildfire smoke and $10,000 ticket prices. Sunday's final between Argentina and Spain — the first meeting of their transcendent stars — is here and seems destined to be a classic.

item.title: In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked so…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked soccer fever, from youth leagues to TV broadcasts to the formation of MLS. Now, can MLS harness this World Cup for a new generation of fans?
item.content:encoded: In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked soccer fever, from youth leagues to TV broadcasts to the formation of MLS. Now, can MLS harness this World Cup for a new generation of fans?

item.title: We saw Jessie Reyez, @nojoy.bsky.social, @kesharose.bsky.soc…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
We saw Jessie Reyez, @nojoy.bsky.social, @kesharose.bsky.social, and more at Festival d'été de Québec, an enjoyable (and affordable) unicorn in North America's crowded festival landscape

👉 stereogum.com/2505733/fest...

[📷: Dylan Page, Marion Desjardins, Stéphane Bourgeois, Sebastien Dion]
item.content:encoded:
We saw Jessie Reyez, @nojoy.bsky.social, @kesharose.bsky.social, and more at Festival d'été de Québec, an enjoyable (and affordable) unicorn in North America's crowded festival landscape

👉 stereogum.com/2505733/fest...

[📷: Dylan Page, Marion Desjardins, Stéphane Bourgeois, Sebastien Dion]

item.title: Just because you live in a small place doesn't mean it has t…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Just because you live in a small place doesn't mean it has to look or feel cramped. Interior designers share creative strategies to create the illusion of space that work for renters and small budgets.
item.content:encoded: Just because you live in a small place doesn't mean it has to look or feel cramped. Interior designers share creative strategies to create the illusion of space that work for renters and small budgets.

item.title: On Monday, former Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham succeeds Kei…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: On Monday, former Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham succeeds Keir Starmer as the United Kingdom's prime minister. Burnham's politics have been shaped by England's north-south class divide. n.pr/4w5haiy
item.content:encoded: On Monday, former Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham succeeds Keir Starmer as the United Kingdom's prime minister. Burnham's politics have been shaped by England's north-south class divide. n.pr/4w5haiy

item.description: Worry no more about wildfire smoke and $10,000 ticket prices. Sunday's final between Argentina and Spain — the first meeting of their transcendent stars — is here and seems destined to be a classic.
item.content:encoded: Worry no more about wildfire smoke and $10,000 ticket prices. Sunday's final between Argentina and Spain — the first meeting of their transcendent stars — is here and seems destined to be a classic.

item.title: Swifts have nested in Jerusalem's Western Wall since biblica…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Swifts have nested in Jerusalem's Western Wall since biblical times. Now one Israeli paraglider is trying to save them. n.pr/4wmcLYH
item.content:encoded: Swifts have nested in Jerusalem's Western Wall since biblical times. Now one Israeli paraglider is trying to save them. n.pr/4wmcLYH

item.title: A famous Cuban dissident artist and musician, Luis Manuel Ot…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A famous Cuban dissident artist and musician, Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, arrived in Miami on Saturday after being released from a five-year prison sentence on the condition that he leave his country.
item.content:encoded: A famous Cuban dissident artist and musician, Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, arrived in Miami on Saturday after being released from a five-year prison sentence on the condition that he leave his country.

item.title: Update: Influencer Andrew Tate and his brother Tristan have…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
Update:

Influencer Andrew Tate and his brother Tristan have been arrested in Miami after British authorities issued 38 new charges against them, and said they are "seeking extradition" for the two men.
item.content:encoded:
Update:

Influencer Andrew Tate and his brother Tristan have been arrested in Miami after British authorities issued 38 new charges against them, and said they are "seeking extradition" for the two men.

item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Tomahawk, the noise-rock supergroup led by Faith No More/Mr. Bungle frontman Mike Patton, played their first show in 13 years

item.title: Russia launched 41 missiles and 125 attack drones across Ukr…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Russia launched 41 missiles and 125 attack drones across Ukraine overnight, according to the Ukrainian air force. n.pr/4wVEuzw
item.content:encoded: Russia launched 41 missiles and 125 attack drones across Ukraine overnight, according to the Ukrainian air force. n.pr/4wVEuzw

item.title: As music becomes increasingly seamless, a new generation of …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: As music becomes increasingly seamless, a new generation of power pop bands is embracing the messy, melodic, and unmistakably human.
item.content:encoded: As music becomes increasingly seamless, a new generation of power pop bands is embracing the messy, melodic, and unmistakably human.

item.title: If an undergraduate program's graduates don't earn more than…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: If an undergraduate program's graduates don't earn more than workers who never went to college, that program could be cut off from federal student loans. But is a degree just about making more money?
item.content:encoded: If an undergraduate program's graduates don't earn more than workers who never went to college, that program could be cut off from federal student loans. But is a degree just about making more money?

item.title: Many schools rely on consumer fees funneled through the fede…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Many schools rely on consumer fees funneled through the federal government to cut internet costs. FCC Chairman Brendan Carr called for ending this program before Donald Trump tapped him for the job.
item.content:encoded: Many schools rely on consumer fees funneled through the federal government to cut internet costs. FCC Chairman Brendan Carr called for ending this program before Donald Trump tapped him for the job.

item.title: The visa process for visiting artists has always been compli…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The visa process for visiting artists has always been complicated and expensive. Under the current administration, it's gotten significantly worse.
item.content:encoded: The visa process for visiting artists has always been complicated and expensive. Under the current administration, it's gotten significantly worse.

item.title: Nursing homes and assisted living facilities can be fertile …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Nursing homes and assisted living facilities can be fertile ground for violence between residents with dementia, including fatal assaults. Court records and inspecitions how safeguards fall short. n.pr/4fiSITK
item.content:encoded: Nursing homes and assisted living facilities can be fertile ground for violence between residents with dementia, including fatal assaults. Court records and inspecitions how safeguards fall short. n.pr/4fiSITK

item.title: It's the first known instance of officials investigating sus…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: It's the first known instance of officials investigating suspected insider trading on a prediction market from inside the White House.
item.content:encoded: It's the first known instance of officials investigating suspected insider trading on a prediction market from inside the White House.

item.content:encoded:

https://natalie.mu/music/news/681539?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#絢香20th

item.title: Just because you live in a small place doesn't mean it has t…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Just because you live in a small place doesn't mean it has to look or feel cramped. Interior designers share creative strategies to create the illusion of space that work for renters and small budgets. n.pr/3RrQ0mO
item.content:encoded: Just because you live in a small place doesn't mean it has to look or feel cramped. Interior designers share creative strategies to create the illusion of space that work for renters and small budgets. n.pr/3RrQ0mO

item.title: A famous Cuban dissident artist and musician, Luis Manuel Ot…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A famous Cuban dissident artist and musician, Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, arrived in Miami on Saturday after being released from a five-year prison sentence on the condition that he leave his country. n.pr/4b4ruz0
item.content:encoded: A famous Cuban dissident artist and musician, Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, arrived in Miami on Saturday after being released from a five-year prison sentence on the condition that he leave his country. n.pr/4b4ruz0

item.title: In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked so…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked soccer fever, from youth leagues to TV broadcasts to the formation of MLS. Now, can MLS harness this World Cup for a new generation of fans? n.pr/4fpdgKa
item.content:encoded: In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked soccer fever, from youth leagues to TV broadcasts to the formation of MLS. Now, can MLS harness this World Cup for a new generation of fans? n.pr/4fpdgKa

item.title: ◻️#超特急 タカシ 写真集「xemx」会見🐈◻️ 「絶対に後悔したくない」渾身の作品への思い 「音楽の日…

item.description:
◻️#超特急 タカシ 写真集「xemx」会見🐈◻️

「絶対に後悔したくない」渾身の作品への思い

「音楽の日」ボーカル選抜の振り返りも🎤
💬「EBiDANには歌が大好きなメンバーがいっぱいいるんだぞ、と示せたことがすごくうれしい」　@sd_bt
https://natalie.mu/music/news/681552?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social
